incoming_email: Hi, I'm new to Hiver. How do I assign an email to one of my teammates? I can't find the assign button.
gold_reply:
Hi John,

Welcome to Hiver! To assign an email, open the thread in Gmail. You will see the Hiver sidebar on the right. Click the 'Assignee' dropdown field, select or search for your colleague, and click save. The email will automatically appear in their 'Assigned to me' tab.

Best,
Alice
Hiver Support
